JOIN academic_advising aa ON s.student_id = aa.student_id
JOIN attendance_records ar ON s.student_id = ar.student_id
JOIN courses c ON ar.course_id = c.course_id
WHERE strftime('%Y', aa.appointment_date) = strftime('%Y', ar.class_date)

query: List course enrollments with student housing status and instructor tenure status.
sql:
SELECT e.enrollment_id, s.housing_status, i.tenure_status
FROM enrollments e
JOIN students s ON e.student_id = s.student_id
JOIN instructors i ON e.instructor_id = i.instructor_id

query: List attendance records for financially aided students with course and program details.
sql:
SELECT
  ar.attendance_id,
  ar.student_id,
  ar.course_id,
  ar.class_date,
  ar.attendance_status,
  s.student_number,
  s.first_name,
  s.last_name,
  c.course_code,
  c.course_title,
  p.program_name
FROM attendance_records ar
JOIN students s ON ar.student_id = s.student_id
JOIN courses c ON ar.course_id = c.course_id
JOIN programs p ON c.program_id = p.program_id
WHERE s.financial_aid_flag = 1

query: List students who completed an online course taught by their assigned advisor, with program and department.
sql: SELECT DISTINCT "students"."first_name", "students"."last_name", "programs"."program_name", "departments"."department_name" FROM "courses" INNER JOIN "departments" ON "courses"."department_id" = "departments"."department_id" INNER JOIN "enrollments" ON "courses"."course_id" = "enrollments"."course_id" INNER JOIN "instructors" ON "courses"."instructor_id" = "instructors"."instructor_id" INNER JOIN "programs" ON "courses"."program_id" = "programs"."program_id" INNER JOIN "students" ON "enrollments"."student_id" = "students"."student_id" WHERE "courses"."delivery_mode" = ? AND "enrollments"."enrollment_status" = ?
audit_note: Never enforces that the course instructor equals the student's assigned advisor.

query: List students with high-risk advising who also have a failed enrollment, with advisor and course.
sql:
SELECT s.student_id, s.first_name, s.last_name, i.first_name, i.last_name, c.course_code, c.course_title
FROM students s
JOIN academic_advising aa ON s.student_id = aa.student_id
JOIN instructors i ON aa.instructor_id = i.instructor_id
JOIN enrollments e ON s.student_id = e.student_id
JOIN courses c ON e.course_id = c.course_id
WHERE aa.academic_risk_level = 'high'
  AND e.enrollment_status = 'failed'

query: List instructors who teach students from a program in a different department than their own.
sql:
SELECT i.instructor_id, i.first_name, i.last_name
FROM instructors i
JOIN courses c ON i.instructor_id = c.instructor_id
JOIN programs p ON c.program_id = p.program_id
JOIN departments d_instr ON i.department_id = d_instr.department_id
JOIN departments d_prog ON p.department_id = d_prog.department_id
WHERE d_instr.department_id != d_prog.department_id
GROUP BY i.instructor_id
audit_note: Compares the instructor department with the course program department rather than with the enrolled student's own program department.

query: List courses whose students come from at least two degree levels, with instructor and department.
sql:
SELECT c.course_id, c.course_title, i.first_name, i.last_name, d.department_name
FROM courses c
JOIN enrollments e ON c.course_id = e.course_id
JOIN students s ON e.student_id = s.student_id
JOIN programs p ON s.program_id = p.program_id
JOIN instructors i ON c.instructor_id = i.instructor_id
JOIN departments d ON c.department_id = d.department_id
GROUP BY c.course_id, c.course_title, i.first_name, i.last_name, d.department_name
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT p.degree_level) >= 2

query: List students who attended courses in both their own department and another department.
sql:
WITH student_dept_enrollments AS (
    SELECT 
        e.student_id,
        c.department_id AS course_dept_id,
        s.program_id,
        p.department_id AS student_program_dept_id
    FROM enrollments e
    JOIN courses c ON e.course_id = c.course_id
    JOIN students s ON e.student_id = s.student_id
    JOIN programs p ON s.program_id = p.program_id
),
student_dept_counts AS (
    SELECT 
        student_id,
        program_id,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN course_dept_id = student_program_dept_id THEN course_dept_id END) AS own_dept_count,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN course_dept_id != student_program_dept_id THEN course_dept_id END) AS other_dept_count
    FROM student_dept_enrollments
    GROUP BY student_id, program_id
)
SELECT 
    s.student_id,
    s.first_name,
    s.last_name
FROM student_dept_counts sd
JOIN students s ON sd.student_id = s.student_id
WHERE sd.own_dept_count > 0 AND sd.other_dept_count > 0
audit_note: Uses enrollment records instead of attendance records to decide which courses students attended.

query: List departments whose instructors advise students from programs in other departments.
sql:
SELECT d.department_id, d.department_name
FROM departments d
JOIN instructors i ON d.department_id = i.department_id
JOIN academic_advising aa ON i.instructor_id = aa.instructor_id
JOIN students s ON aa.student_id = s.student_id
JOIN programs p ON s.program_id = p.program_id
WHERE p.department_id != d.department_id
GROUP BY d.department_id, d.department_name

query: List students with completed enrollments and absent attendance records for the same course.
sql:
SELECT DISTINCT s.student_id, s.first_name, s.last_name
FROM students s
JOIN enrollments e ON s.student_id = e.student_id
JOIN attendance_records ar ON e.enrollment_id = ar.enrollment_id
WHERE e.enrollment_status = 'completed'
  AND ar.attendance_status = 'absent'

query: List courses where the course instructor, enrollment instructor, and attendance instructor do not all match.
sql:
SELECT c.course_id, c.course_code, c.course_title
FROM courses c
WHERE EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM enrollments e
    JOIN attendance_records a ON e.enrollment_id = a.enrollment_id
    WHERE e.course_id = c.course_id
      AND (c.instructor_id != e.instructor_id OR c.instructor_id != a.instructor_id OR e.instructor_id != a.instructor_id)
)

query: List students who received scholarships for courses taught by tenured instructors outside their program.
sql:
SELECT DISTINCT s.student_id, s.first_name, s.last_name
FROM students s
JOIN enrollments e ON s.student_id = e.student_id
JOIN courses c ON e.course_id = c.course_id
JOIN instructors i ON c.instructor_id = i.instructor_id
WHERE e.scholarship_amount > 0
  AND i.tenure_status = 'tenured'
  AND c.program_id != s.program_id

query: List advisors whose assigned students completed courses taught by another instructor in the advisor's department.
sql: SELECT DISTINCT "instructors"."instructor_id", "instructors"."first_name", "instructors"."last_name" FROM "instructors" INNER JOIN "enrollments" ON "instructors"."instructor_id" = "enrollments"."instructor_id" INNER JOIN "courses" ON "enrollments"."course_id" = "courses"."course_id" INNER JOIN "students" ON "instructors"."instructor_id" = "students"."advisor_instructor_id" WHERE "instructors"."active_flag" = ? AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM "enrollments" WHERE "instructors"."instructor_id" = "enrollments"."instructor_id" AND "enrollments"."student_id" = "students"."student_id" AND "enrollments"."course_id" = "courses"."course_id" AND "courses"."instructor_id" != "instructors"."instructor_id" AND "courses"."department_id" = "instructors"."department_id")
audit_note: Does not correctly connect assigned advisors to their students' completed courses taught by another instructor in the advisor's department.

query: List programs whose students enrolled in every delivery mode offered by that program's department.
sql:
SELECT p.program_id, p.program_name
FROM programs p
JOIN departments d ON p.department_id = d.department_id
JOIN courses c ON c.program_id = p.program_id
JOIN enrollments e ON e.course_id = c.course_id
GROUP BY p.program_id, p.program_name
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT c.delivery_mode) = (
    SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT c2.delivery_mode)
    FROM courses c2
    WHERE c2.department_id = d.department_id
)
audit_note: Counts delivery modes of program courses having any enrollment, not the modes taken by that program's students compared with all modes in the department.

query: List students who completed a prerequisite course before enrolling in a course that requires it.
sql:
SELECT DISTINCT s.student_id
FROM students s
JOIN enrollments e1 ON s.student_id = e1.student_id
JOIN enrollments e2 ON s.student_id = e2.student_id
JOIN courses c ON e1.course_id = c.prerequisite_course_id AND e2.course_id = c.course_id
WHERE e1.enrollment_date < e2.enrollment_date
  AND e1.enrollment_status = 'completed'
  AND e2.enrollment_status = 'completed'
audit_note: Unnecessarily requires the later course enrollment to be completed; the request only requires enrollment after completing the prerequisite.

query: List instructors teaching active courses whose enrolled students have high-risk advising records.
sql:
SELECT DISTINCT i.instructor_id, i.first_name, i.last_name
FROM instructors i
JOIN courses c ON i.instructor_id = c.instructor_id
JOIN enrollments e ON c.course_id = e.course_id
JOIN academic_advising aa ON e.student_id = aa.student_id
WHERE c.active_flag = '1'
  AND aa.academic_risk_level = 'high'

query: List departments with active students, completed enrollments, and absent attendance records.
sql: SELECT "departments"."department_id", "departments"."department_name" FROM "students" INNER JOIN "enrollments" ON "students"."student_id" = "enrollments"."student_id" INNER JOIN "attendance_records" ON "enrollments"."enrollment_id" = "attendance_records"."enrollment_id" INNER JOIN "programs" ON "students"."program_id" = "programs"."program_id" INNER JOIN "departments" ON "programs"."department_id" = "departments"."department_id" WHERE "students"."student_status" = ? AND "enrollments"."enrollment_status" = ? AND "attendance_records"."attendance_status" = ? GROUP BY "departments"."department_id", "departments"."department_name"

query: List students whose advisor, course instructor, and advising instructor are three different people.
sql:
SELECT DISTINCT s.student_id, s.first_name, s.last_name
FROM students s
JOIN enrollments e ON s.student_id = e.student_id
JOIN courses c ON e.course_id = c.course_id
JOIN instructors i_course ON c.instructor_id = i_course.instructor_id
JOIN academic_advising aa ON s.student_id = aa.student_id
JOIN instructors i_advisor ON s.advisor_instructor_id = i_advisor.instructor_id
JOIN instructors i_adv_instructor ON aa.instructor_id = i_adv_instructor.instructor_id
WHERE s.advisor_instructor_id IS NOT NULL
  AND c.instructor_id IS NOT NULL
  AND aa.instructor_id IS NOT NULL
  AND s.advisor_instructor_id != c.instructor_id
  AND s.advisor_instructor_id != aa.instructor_id
  AND c.instructor_id != aa.instructor_id

query: Show the 10 students with the highest cumulative GPA.
sql:
SELECT students.student_id, students.first_name, students.last_name, students.cumulative_gpa
FROM students
ORDER BY students.cumulative_gpa DESC
LIMIT 10

query: Show the 10 students with the most credits earned.
sql:
SELECT student_id, first_name, last_name, credits_earned
FROM students
ORDER BY credits_earned DESC
LIMIT 10

query: Show the 5 departments with the largest annual budgets.
sql:
SELECT department_name, annual_budget
FROM departments
ORDER BY annual_budget DESC
LIMIT 5

query: Show the 5 departments with the highest reported student counts.
sql:
SELECT departments.department_name, departments.student_count
FROM departments
ORDER BY departments.student_count DESC
LIMIT 5

query: Show the 10 instructors with the highest salaries.
sql:
SELECT instructor_id, first_name, last_name, salary
FROM instructors
ORDER BY salary DESC
LIMIT 10

query: Show the 10 instructors with the highest performance ratings.
sql:
SELECT instructor_id, first_name, last_name, performance_rating
FROM instructors
ORDER BY performance_rating DESC
LIMIT 10

query: Show the 5 programs with the highest tuition per credit.
sql:
SELECT program_id, program_name, tuition_per_credit
FROM programs
ORDER BY tuition_per_credit DESC
LIMIT 5

query: Show the 5 programs with the most current enrollment.
sql:
SELECT program_id, program_name, current_enrollment
FROM programs
ORDER BY current_enrollment DESC
LIMIT 5

query: Show the 10 courses with the largest capacity.
sql:
SELECT courses.course_id, courses.course_title, courses.capacity
FROM courses
ORDER BY courses.capacity DESC
LIMIT 10

query: Show the 10 courses with the highest enrolled count.
sql:
SELECT courses.course_id, courses.course_title, courses.enrolled_count
FROM courses
ORDER BY courses.enrolled_count DESC
LIMIT 10

query: Show the 10 enrollments with the highest numeric grades.
sql:
SELECT enrollment_id, student_id, course_id, numeric_grade
FROM enrollments
ORDER BY numeric_grade DESC
LIMIT 10

query: Show the 10 enrollments with the largest scholarship amounts.
sql:
SELECT enrollment_id, student_id, course_id, scholarship_amount
FROM enrollments
ORDER BY scholarship_amount DESC
LIMIT 10

query: Show the 10 advising appointments with the highest satisfaction scores.
sql:
SELECT advising_id, student_id, instructor_id, program_id, appointment_date, appointment_type, meeting_mode, duration_minutes, topics_discussed, action_items, next_followup_date, student_satisfaction, advisor_notes, academic_risk_level, career_goal, graduation_plan_status, referral_made, completed_flag
FROM academic_advising
ORDER BY student_satisfaction DESC
LIMIT 10

query: Show the 10 attendance records with the highest quiz scores.
sql:
SELECT attendance_id, student_id, course_id, quiz_score
FROM attendance_records
ORDER BY quiz_score DESC
LIMIT 10

query: Show the 10 attendance records with the most minutes late.
sql:
SELECT attendance_id, student_id, course_id, minutes_late
FROM attendance_records
ORDER BY minutes_late DESC
LIMIT 10

query: Show the top 10 programs by number of active students.
sql:
SELECT p.program_name, p.program_id
FROM programs p
JOIN students s ON p.program_id = s.program_id
WHERE s.student_status = 'active'
GROUP BY p.program_id, p.program_name
ORDER BY COUNT(s.student_id) DESC
LIMIT 10

query: Show the top 5 departments by number of active instructors.
sql:
SELECT d.department_name
FROM departments d
JOIN instructors i ON d.department_id = i.department_id
WHERE i.active_flag = '1'
GROUP BY d.department_id
ORDER BY COUNT(i.instructor_id) DESC
LIMIT 5

query: Show the top 10 instructors by number of courses taught.
sql:
SELECT i.instructor_id, i.first_name, i.last_name
FROM instructors i
JOIN courses c ON i.instructor_id = c.instructor_id
GROUP BY i.instructor_id, i.first_name, i.last_name
ORDER BY COUNT(c.course_id) DESC
LIMIT 10

query: Show the top 10 courses by number of completed enrollments.
sql:
SELECT c.course_id, c.course_title
FROM courses c
JOIN enrollments e ON c.course_id = e.course_id
WHERE e.enrollment_status = 'completed'
GROUP BY c.course_id, c.course_title
ORDER BY COUNT(e.enrollment_id) DESC
LIMIT 10

query: Show the top 10 students by total tuition charged.
sql:
SELECT s.student_id, s.first_name, s.last_name
FROM students s
JOIN enrollments e ON s.student_id = e.student_id
GROUP BY s.student_id
ORDER BY SUM(e.tuition_amount) DESC
LIMIT 10

query: Show the top 10 students by total scholarship received.
sql:
SELECT s.student_id, s.first_name, s.last_name
FROM students s
JOIN enrollments e ON s.student_id = e.student_id
GROUP BY s.student_id, s.first_name, s.last_name
ORDER BY SUM(e.scholarship_amount) DESC
LIMIT 10

query: Show the top 5 programs by total scholarship amount.
sql:
SELECT p.program_name
FROM enrollments e
JOIN programs p ON e.course_id = (SELECT course_id FROM courses WHERE program_id = p.program_id LIMIT 1)
GROUP BY p.program_id, p.program_name
ORDER BY SUM(e.scholarship_amount) DESC
LIMIT 5
audit_note: Maps each program through one arbitrary course, so the scholarship ranking omits most program enrollments.

query: Show the top 5 departments by total instructor payroll.
sql:
SELECT d.department_name
FROM departments d
JOIN instructors i ON d.department_id = i.department_id
GROUP BY d.department_id
ORDER BY SUM(i.salary) DESC
LIMIT 5

query: Show the top 10 courses by average numeric grade.
sql:
SELECT c.course_id, c.course_title
FROM courses c
JOIN enrollments e ON c.course_id = e.course_id
GROUP BY c.course_id, c.course_title
ORDER BY AVG(e.numeric_grade) DESC
LIMIT 10

query: Show the top 10 instructors by average student grade.
sql:
SELECT i.instructor_id, i.first_name, i.last_name
FROM instructors i
JOIN enrollments e ON i.instructor_id = e.instructor_id
GROUP BY i.instructor_id, i.first_name, i.last_name
ORDER BY AVG(e.numeric_grade) DESC
LIMIT 10

query: Show the top 10 students by number of advising appointments.
sql:
SELECT s.student_id, s.first_name, s.last_name
FROM students s
JOIN academic_advising aa ON s.student_id = aa.student_id
GROUP BY s.student_id, s.first_name, s.last_name
ORDER BY COUNT(aa.advising_id) DESC
LIMIT 10

query: Show the top 10 advisors by number of completed appointments.
sql:
SELECT i.instructor_id, i.first_name, i.last_name
FROM academic_advising aa
JOIN instructors i ON aa.instructor_id = i.instructor_id
WHERE aa.completed_flag = '1'
GROUP BY i.instructor_id, i.first_name, i.last_name
ORDER BY COUNT(aa.advising_id) DESC
LIMIT 10

query: Show the top 10 courses by number of absent attendance records.
sql:
SELECT c.course_id, c.course_title
FROM courses c
JOIN attendance_records ar ON c.course_id = ar.course_id
WHERE ar.attendance_status = 'absent'
GROUP BY c.course_id, c.course_title
ORDER BY COUNT(ar.attendance_id) DESC
LIMIT 10

query: Show the top 5 programs by average student GPA.
sql:
SELECT p.program_name
FROM programs p
JOIN students s ON p.program_id = s.program_id
GROUP BY p.program_id
ORDER BY AVG(s.cumulative_gpa) DESC
LIMIT 5

query: Show the top 10 courses by average attendance percentage.
sql:
SELECT c.course_id, c.course_title
FROM courses c
JOIN enrollments e ON c.course_id = e.course_id
GROUP BY c.course_id, c.course_title
ORDER BY AVG(e.attendance_percentage) DESC
LIMIT 10

query: Show the top 5 degree levels by total current enrollment.
sql:
SELECT degree_level, SUM(current_enrollment) AS total_enrollment
FROM programs
GROUP BY degree_level
ORDER BY total_enrollment DESC
LIMIT 5

query: Show the top 10 research areas by average instructor performance rating.
sql:
SELECT research_area, AVG(performance_rating) AS avg_performance_rating
FROM instructors
GROUP BY research_area
ORDER BY avg_performance_rating DESC
LIMIT 10

query: Show the top 10 students by number of completed enrollments.
sql:
SELECT s.student_id, s.first_name, s.last_name
FROM students s
JOIN enrollments e ON s.student_id = e.student_id
WHERE e.enrollment_status = 'completed'
GROUP BY s.student_id, s.first_name, s.last_name
ORDER BY COUNT(e.enrollment_id) DESC
LIMIT 10

query: Show the top 10 courses by total tuition amount.
sql:
SELECT c.course_id, c.course_title
FROM courses c
JOIN enrollments e ON c.course_id = e.course_id
GROUP BY c.course_id, c.course_title
ORDER BY SUM(e.tuition_amount) DESC
LIMIT 10

query: Show the top 10 instructors by number of student attendance records.
sql:
SELECT i.instructor_id, i.first_name, i.last_name
FROM attendance_records ar
JOIN instructors i ON ar.instructor_id = i.instructor_id
GROUP BY i.instructor_id, i.first_name, i.last_name
ORDER BY COUNT(ar.attendance_id) DESC
LIMIT 10

query: Show the top 3 students by GPA within each program.
sql:
WITH ranked_students AS (
    SELECT 
        student_id,
        program_id,
        cumulative_gpa,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY program_id ORDER BY cumulative_gpa DESC) AS rank_num
    FROM students
)
SELECT 
    student_id,
    program_id,
    cumulative_gpa
FROM ranked_students
WHERE rank_num <= 3

query: Show the highest-paid instructor in each department.
sql:
WITH RankedInstructors AS (
    SELECT 
        d.department_name,
        i.first_name,
        i.last_name,
        i.salary,
        d.department_id,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY d.department_id ORDER BY i.salary DESC) AS rn
    FROM instructors i
    JOIN departments d ON i.department_id = d.department_id
)
SELECT 
    department_name,
    first_name,
    last_name,
    salary
FROM RankedInstructors
WHERE rn = 1

query: Show the top 3 courses by enrolled count within each department.
sql:
WITH ranked_courses AS (
    SELECT
        c.course_id,
        c.course_title,
        d.department_name,
        c.enrolled_count,
        c.department_id,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY c.department_id ORDER BY c.enrolled_count DESC) AS rn
    FROM courses c
    JOIN departments d ON c.department_id = d.department_id
)
SELECT
    course_id,
    course_title,
    department_name,
    enrolled_count
FROM ranked_courses
WHERE rn <= 3

query: Show the top 3 programs by active student count within each degree level.
sql:
WITH program_active_counts AS (
    SELECT 
        p.program_id,
        p.program_name,
        p.degree_level,
        COUNT(s.student_id) AS active_student_count
    FROM programs p
    JOIN students s ON p.program_id = s.program_id
    WHERE s.student_status = 'active'
    GROUP BY p.program_id, p.program_name, p.degree_level
),
ranked_programs AS (
    SELECT 
        program_name,
        degree_level,
        active_student_count,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY degree_level ORDER BY active_student_count DESC) AS rank_num
    FROM program_active_counts
)
SELECT 
    program_name,
    degree_level
FROM ranked_programs
WHERE rank_num <= 3

query: Show the top 5 advisors by average GPA of their assigned students.
sql:
SELECT i.instructor_id, i.first_name, i.last_name
FROM instructors i
JOIN students s ON i.instructor_id = s.advisor_instructor_id
GROUP BY i.instructor_id, i.first_name, i.last_name
ORDER BY AVG(s.cumulative_gpa) DESC
LIMIT 5

query: Show the top 3 instructors by average completed-course grade within each department.
sql:
WITH instructor_dept_avg AS (
    SELECT 
        i.instructor_id,
        i.full_name,
        i.department_id,
        d.department_name,
        AVG(e.numeric_grade) AS avg_grade
    FROM instructors i
    JOIN departments d ON i.department_id = d.department_id
    JOIN enrollments e ON i.instructor_id = e.instructor_id
    WHERE e.enrollment_status = 'completed'
    GROUP BY i.instructor_id, i.full_name, i.department_id, d.department_name
),
ranked_instructors AS (
    SELECT 
        department_name,
        instructor_id,
        full_name,
        avg_grade,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY department_id ORDER BY avg_grade DESC) AS rank_in_dept
    FROM instructor_dept_avg
)
SELECT 
    department_name,
    instructor_id,
    full_name
FROM ranked_instructors
WHERE rank_in_dept <= 3
ORDER BY department_name, rank_in_dept

query: Show the top 3 courses by attendance rate within each program.
sql:
WITH course_avg_attendance AS (
    SELECT 
        c.course_id,
        c.course_title,
        c.program_id,
        AVG(e.attendance_percentage) AS avg_attendance_percentage
    FROM courses c
    JOIN enrollments e ON c.course_id = e.course_id
    GROUP BY c.course_id, c.course_title, c.program_id
),
ranked_courses AS (
    SELECT 
        ca.course_id,
        ca.course_title,
        ca.program_id,
        p.program_name,
        ca.avg_attendance_percentage,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ca.program_id ORDER BY ca.avg_attendance_percentage DESC) AS rn
    FROM course_avg_attendance ca
    JOIN programs p ON ca.program_id = p.program_id
)
SELECT 
    course_id,
    course_title,
    program_id,
    program_name,
    avg_attendance_percentage
FROM ranked_courses
WHERE rn <= 3
ORDER BY program_id, rn

query: Show the top 5 students by scholarship percentage among students charged at least 5000 dollars in tuition.
sql:
SELECT s.student_id, s.first_name, s.last_name, e.scholarship_amount, e.tuition_amount
FROM students s
JOIN enrollments e ON s.student_id = e.student_id
WHERE e.tuition_amount >= 5000
ORDER BY (e.scholarship_amount * 1.0 / e.tuition_amount) DESC
LIMIT 5
audit_note: Ranks individual enrollment rows instead of aggregating tuition and scholarship percentage per student.

query: Show the top 3 departments by course seat utilization.
sql:
SELECT d.department_name
FROM departments d
JOIN courses c ON d.department_id = c.department_id
GROUP BY d.department_id, d.department_name
ORDER BY SUM(c.enrolled_count) * 1.0 / SUM(c.capacity) DESC
LIMIT 3

query: Show the top 5 programs by completed enrollment rate.
sql: SELECT "programs"."program_id", "programs"."program_name", COUNT(*) AS "total_enrollments", COUNT(*) AS "completed_enrollments" FROM "programs" INNER JOIN "courses" ON "programs"."program_id" = "courses"."program_id" INNER JOIN "enrollments" ON "courses"."course_id" = "enrollments"."course_id" GROUP BY "programs"."program_id", "programs"."program_name" ORDER BY "completed_enrollments" DESC LIMIT 5
audit_note: Uses identical total and completed counts, never filters completed enrollments, and never calculates a rate.

query: Show the top 3 courses with the most distinct student programs represented.
sql: SELECT "courses"."course_code", "courses"."course_title", COUNT(DISTINCT "students"."program_id") AS "distinct_program_count" FROM "enrollments" INNER JOIN "courses" ON "enrollments"."course_id" = "courses"."course_id" INNER JOIN "students" ON "enrollments"."student_id" = "students"."student_id" GROUP BY "courses"."course_code", "courses"."course_title" ORDER BY "distinct_program_count" DESC LIMIT 3

query: Show the top 5 instructors by completed enrollments per course taught.
sql:
SELECT i.instructor_id, i.first_name, i.last_name
FROM instructors i
JOIN enrollments e ON i.instructor_id = e.instructor_id
WHERE e.enrollment_status = 'completed'
GROUP BY i.instructor_id, i.first_name, i.last_name
ORDER BY COUNT(e.enrollment_id) DESC
LIMIT 5
audit_note: Ranks by total completed enrollments only and never divides by the number of courses taught.

query: Show the top 3 departments by average active-student GPA.
sql: SELECT "departments"."department_name", AVG("students"."cumulative_gpa") AS "avg_gpa" FROM "programs" INNER JOIN "departments" ON "programs"."department_id" = "departments"."department_id" INNER JOIN "students" ON "programs"."program_id" = "students"."program_id" WHERE "students"."student_status" = ? GROUP BY "departments"."department_name" ORDER BY "avg_gpa" DESC LIMIT 3

query: Show the top 5 students by attended class sessions within each current year level.
sql:
WITH student_attendance AS (
    SELECT 
        s.student_id,
        s.current_year,
        s.first_name,
        s.last_name,
        COUNT(ar.attendance_id) AS attended_sessions
    FROM students s
    JOIN attendance_records ar ON s.student_id = ar.student_id
    WHERE ar.attendance_status = 'present'
    GROUP BY s.student_id, s.current_year, s.first_name, s.last_name
),
ranked_students AS (
    SELECT 
        student_id,
        current_year,
        first_name,
        last_name,
        attended_sessions,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY current_year ORDER BY attended_sessions DESC) AS rn
    FROM student_attendance
)
SELECT 
    student_id,
    current_year,
    first_name,
    last_name
FROM ranked_students
WHERE rn <= 5
ORDER BY current_year, attended_sessions DESC
audit_note: Counts only present sessions and omits late and excused sessions that also represent attendance.

query: Show the top 3 programs by average advising satisfaction among programs with at least three appointments.
sql:
SELECT p.program_name
FROM academic_advising aa
JOIN programs p ON aa.program_id = p.program_id
GROUP BY p.program_id
HAVING COUNT(aa.appointment_date) >= 3
ORDER BY AVG(aa.student_satisfaction) DESC
LIMIT 3

query: List people who appear either as students or instructors.
sql:
SELECT student_id AS person_id, first_name, last_name, NULL AS instructor_id, NULL AS instructor_first_name, NULL AS instructor_last_name
FROM students
UNION ALL
SELECT NULL AS person_id, NULL AS first_name, NULL AS last_name, instructor_id, first_name, last_name
FROM instructors

query: List department identifiers that appear either in programs or courses.
sql:
SELECT DISTINCT department_id FROM programs
UNION
SELECT DISTINCT department_id FROM courses

query: List instructor identifiers that appear either as student advisors or course instructors.
sql:
SELECT DISTINCT instructor_id
FROM (
    SELECT students.advisor_instructor_id AS instructor_id
    FROM students
    WHERE students.advisor_instructor_id IS NOT NULL
    UNION
    SELECT courses.instructor_id
    FROM courses
    WHERE courses.instructor_id IS NOT NULL
)
WHERE instructor_id IN (SELECT instructor_id FROM instructors)

query: List student identifiers that appear either in enrollments or advising appointments.
sql:
SELECT DISTINCT s.student_id
FROM students s
JOIN academic_advising aa ON s.student_id = aa.student_id
JOIN enrollments e ON s.student_id = e.student_id
audit_note: Uses inner joins, returning only students present in both sources instead of the union of enrollment and advising identifiers.

query: List course identifiers that appear either in enrollments or attendance records.
sql: SELECT DISTINCT "courses"."course_id", "courses"."course_title" FROM "attendance_records" INNER JOIN "courses" ON "attendance_records"."course_id" = "courses"."course_id" INNER JOIN "enrollments" ON "attendance_records"."enrollment_id" = "enrollments"."enrollment_id"
audit_note: Returns only courses present in linked enrollment-and-attendance rows instead of the union of both sources.

query: List instructor identifiers that appear either in enrollments or attendance records.
sql:
SELECT DISTINCT i.instructor_id
FROM instructors i
JOIN enrollments e ON i.instructor_id = e.instructor_id
JOIN attendance_records a ON i.instructor_id = a.instructor_id
audit_note: Uses inner joins, returning the intersection of enrollment and attendance instructors instead of their union.

query: List program identifiers that appear either in student records or course records.
sql:
SELECT DISTINCT p.program_id
FROM programs p
JOIN students s ON p.program_id = s.program_id
JOIN courses c ON p.program_id = c.program_id
audit_note: Uses inner joins, returning programs present in both students and courses instead of either source.

query: List students who are either active or on leave.
sql:
SELECT student_id, first_name, last_name, student_status
FROM students
WHERE student_status IN ('active', 'on leave')
audit_note: Uses the literal 'on leave', but the stored student status is 'leave'.

query: List instructors who are either full time or part time.
sql: SELECT "instructors"."instructor_id", "instructors"."first_name", "instructors"."last_name" FROM "instructors" WHERE "instructors"."employment_type" = 'full_time' OR "instructors"."employment_type" = 'part_time'

query: List programs that use either online or hybrid delivery.
sql: SELECT "programs"."program_id", "programs"."program_name" FROM "programs" WHERE "programs"."delivery_mode" = ? OR "programs"."delivery_mode" = ?

query: List courses offered either in fall or spring.
sql: SELECT "courses"."course_id", "courses"."course_code", "courses"."course_title" FROM "courses" WHERE "courses"."semester" = ? OR "courses"."semester" = ?

query: List enrollments that are either completed or failed.
sql:
SELECT enrollment_id, student_id, course_id, enrollment_status
FROM enrollments
WHERE enrollment_status IN ('completed', 'failed')

query: List advising appointments that are either career or graduation related.
sql:
SELECT advising_id, student_id, instructor_id, appointment_date, appointment_type
FROM academic_advising
WHERE appointment_type IN ('career', 'graduation')

query: List attendance records marked either absent or late.
sql:
SELECT attendance_records.attendance_id, attendance_records.student_id, attendance_records.course_id, attendance_records.class_date, attendance_records.attendance_status
FROM attendance_records
WHERE attendance_records.attendance_status IN ('absent', 'late')

query: List departments located either on the main campus or north campus.
sql:
SELECT department_id, department_name, campus_code
FROM departments
WHERE campus_code IN ('MAIN', 'NORTH')

query: List students who have both an enrollment and an advising appointment.
sql:
SELECT DISTINCT s.student_id, s.first_name, s.last_name
FROM students s
JOIN academic_advising aa ON s.student_id = aa.student_id
JOIN enrollments e ON s.student_id = e.student_id

query: List instructors who both teach a course and advise at least one student.
sql: SELECT "instructors"."instructor_id", "instructors"."first_name", "instructors"."last_name", COUNT(*) AS "course_count", COUNT(*) AS "advising_count" FROM "instructors" INNER JOIN "academic_advising" ON "instructors"."instructor_id" = "academic_advising"."instructor_id" INNER JOIN "courses" ON "instructors"."instructor_id" = "courses"."instructor_id" GROUP BY "instructors"."instructor_id", "instructors"."first_name", "instructors"."last_name" HAVING "course_count" >= ? AND "advising_count" >= ?

query: List courses that have both enrollment records and attendance records.
sql:
SELECT DISTINCT c.course_id, c.course_code, c.course_title
FROM courses c
JOIN enrollments e ON c.course_id = e.course_id
JOIN attendance_records ar ON e.enrollment_id = ar.enrollment_id

query: List departments that have both programs and instructors.
sql:
SELECT d.department_id, d.department_name
FROM departments d
JOIN programs p ON d.department_id = p.department_id
JOIN instructors i ON d.department_id = i.department_id
GROUP BY d.department_id, d.department_name
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT p.program_id) > 0 AND COUNT(DISTINCT i.instructor_id) > 0

query: List programs that have both students and courses.
sql:
SELECT p.program_id, p.program_name
FROM programs p
JOIN students s ON p.program_id = s.program_id
JOIN courses c ON p.program_id = c.program_id
GROUP BY p.program_id
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT s.student_id) > 0 AND COUNT(DISTINCT c.course_id) > 0

query: List students who have a completed enrollment but no failed enrollment.
sql:
SELECT s.student_id, s.first_name, s.last_name
FROM students s
JOIN enrollments e ON s.student_id = e.student_id
WHERE EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM enrollments e1
    WHERE e1.student_id = s.student_id
      AND e1.enrollment_status = 'completed'
)
AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM enrollments e2
    WHERE e2.student_id = s.student_id
      AND e2.enrollment_status = 'failed'
)
GROUP BY s.student_id, s.first_name, s.last_name

query: List courses that have completed enrollments but no withdrawn enrollments.
sql:
SELECT c.course_id, c.course_code, c.course_title
FROM courses c
JOIN enrollments e ON c.course_id = e.course_id
GROUP BY c.course_id, c.course_code, c.course_title
HAVING SUM(CASE WHEN e.enrollment_status = 'completed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0
   AND SUM(CASE WHEN e.enrollment_status = 'withdrawn' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 0

query: List instructors who teach active courses but have no advising appointments.
sql:
SELECT i.instructor_id, i.first_name, i.last_name
FROM instructors i
JOIN courses c ON i.instructor_id = c.instructor_id
WHERE c.active_flag = '1'
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM academic_advising aa
    WHERE aa.instructor_id = i.instructor_id
  )
GROUP BY i.instructor_id, i.first_name, i.last_name

query: List students who received advising but have no enrollment records.
sql:
SELECT s.student_id, s.first_name, s.last_name
FROM students s
JOIN academic_advising aa ON s.student_id = aa.student_id
WHERE NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM enrollments e
    WHERE e.student_id = s.student_id
)
audit_note: Returns duplicate student rows when a student has multiple advising appointments.

query: List programs with active students but no active courses.
sql:
SELECT p.program_id, p.program_name
FROM programs p
JOIN students s ON p.program_id = s.program_id
JOIN courses c ON p.program_id = c.program_id
WHERE NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM courses c2
    WHERE c2.program_id = p.program_id
      AND c2.active_flag = '1'
)
GROUP BY p.program_id, p.program_name
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT s.student_id) >= 1
audit_note: The inner course join excludes programs with active students and no courses, even though they have no active courses.

query: List departments with active instructors but no active programs.
sql: SELECT "departments"."department_id", "departments"."department_name" FROM "departments" INNER JOIN "instructors" ON "departments"."department_id" = "instructors"."department_id" INNER JOIN "programs" ON "departments"."department_id" = "programs"."department_id" WHERE "instructors"."active_flag" = ? AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM "programs" WHERE "departments"."department_id" = "programs"."department_id" AND "programs"."active_flag" = ?) GROUP BY "departments"."department_id", "departments"."department_name"
audit_note: The inner program join excludes departments with active instructors and no programs, even though they have no active programs.

query: List students who attended an online course but never attended an in-person course.
sql:
SELECT s.student_id, s.first_name, s.last_name
FROM students s
JOIN enrollments e ON s.student_id = e.student_id
JOIN courses c ON e.course_id = c.course_id
WHERE c.delivery_mode = 'online'
AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM enrollments e2
    JOIN courses c2 ON e2.course_id = c2.course_id
    WHERE e2.student_id = s.student_id
    AND c2.delivery_mode = 'in_person'
)
GROUP BY s.student_id, s.first_name, s.last_name
audit_note: Treats course enrollment as attendance and never uses attendance_records.

query: List courses attended by international students but not domestic students.
sql: SELECT DISTINCT "courses"."course_id", "courses"."course_code", "courses"."course_title" FROM "enrollments" INNER JOIN "courses" ON "enrollments"."course_id" = "courses"."course_id" INNER JOIN "students" ON "enrollments"."student_id" = "students"."student_id" WHERE "students"."citizenship_status" = ? AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM "students" WHERE "enrollments"."student_id" = "students"."student_id" AND "enrollments"."course_id" = "courses"."course_id" AND "students"."citizenship_status" = ?)
audit_note: The NOT EXISTS clause checks only the current international student's row and does not exclude courses that also have domestic students.

query: List instructors who taught completed enrollments but no failed enrollments.
sql:
SELECT i.instructor_id, i.first_name, i.last_name
FROM instructors i
JOIN enrollments e ON i.instructor_id = e.instructor_id
GROUP BY i.instructor_id, i.first_name, i.last_name
HAVING COUNT(CASE WHEN e.enrollment_status = 'completed' THEN 1 END) >= 1
   AND COUNT(CASE WHEN e.enrollment_status = 'failed' THEN 1 END) = 0

query: List students with present attendance records but no absent attendance records.
sql:
SELECT s.student_id, s.first_name, s.last_name
FROM students s
JOIN attendance_records a ON s.student_id = a.student_id
WHERE NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM attendance_records a2
    WHERE a2.student_id = s.student_id
      AND a2.attendance_status = 'absent'
)
GROUP BY s.student_id, s.first_name, s.last_name
HAVING COUNT(CASE WHEN a.attendance_status = 'present' THEN 1 END) > 0

query: List programs represented in both completed and withdrawn enrollments.
sql: SELECT "programs"."program_id", "programs"."program_name", COUNT(*) AS "completed_count", COUNT(*) AS "withdrawn_count" FROM "enrollments" INNER JOIN "courses" ON "enrollments"."course_id" = "courses"."course_id" INNER JOIN "programs" ON "courses"."program_id" = "programs"."program_id" GROUP BY "programs"."program_id", "programs"."program_name" HAVING "completed_count" > ? AND "withdrawn_count" > ?
audit_note: Uses identical counts for completed and withdrawn enrollments without status-specific conditions.

query: List departments represented by both bachelor and master programs.
sql:
SELECT d.department_id, d.department_name
FROM departments d
JOIN programs p ON d.department_id = p.department_id
WHERE p.degree_level IN ('bachelor', 'master')
GROUP BY d.department_id, d.department_name
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT p.degree_level) = 2

query: List students who have both high-risk advising and completed advising appointments.
sql:
SELECT DISTINCT s.student_id, s.first_name, s.last_name
FROM students s
JOIN academic_advising aa ON s.student_id = aa.student_id
WHERE aa.academic_risk_level = 'high'
  AND aa.completed_flag = '1'
audit_note: Requires one advising row to be both high-risk and completed instead of testing independent existence of both kinds of appointments.

query: List courses taught by tenured instructors but not by non-tenured instructors.
sql:
SELECT c.course_id, c.course_code, c.course_title
FROM courses c
JOIN instructors i ON c.instructor_id = i.instructor_id
WHERE i.tenure_status = 'tenured'
AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM courses c2
    JOIN instructors i2 ON c2.instructor_id = i2.instructor_id
    WHERE c2.course_id = c.course_id
    AND i2.tenure_status = 'non_tenure'
)

query: List instructors whose students include both residents and nonresidents.
sql:
SELECT i.instructor_id, i.first_name, i.last_name
FROM instructors i
JOIN students s ON i.instructor_id = s.advisor_instructor_id
WHERE s.residency_status IN ('resident', 'nonresident')
GROUP BY i.instructor_id, i.first_name, i.last_name
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT s.residency_status) = 2

query: List students who completed both online and in-person courses but never completed a hybrid course.
sql:
SELECT s.student_id, s.first_name, s.last_name
FROM students s
JOIN enrollments e ON s.student_id = e.student_id
JOIN courses c ON e.course_id = c.course_id
WHERE e.enrollment_status = 'completed'
GROUP BY s.student_id, s.first_name, s.last_name
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN c.delivery_mode = 'online' THEN c.course_id END) > 0
   AND COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN c.delivery_mode = 'in_person' THEN c.course_id END) > 0
   AND COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN c.delivery_mode = 'hybrid' THEN c.course_id END) = 0

query: List instructors who both teach courses and conduct advising but are not assigned as student advisors.
sql:
SELECT i.instructor_id, i.first_name, i.last_name
FROM instructors i
JOIN courses c ON i.instructor_id = c.instructor_id
JOIN academic_advising aa ON i.instructor_id = aa.instructor_id
WHERE NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM students s
    WHERE s.advisor_instructor_id = i.instructor_id
)
GROUP BY i.instructor_id, i.first_name, i.last_name

query: List programs with students in both domestic and international groups but no permanent-resident students.
sql:
SELECT p.program_id, p.program_name
FROM programs p
JOIN students s ON p.program_id = s.program_id
GROUP BY p.program_id, p.program_name
HAVING COUNT(CASE WHEN s.citizenship_status = 'domestic' THEN 1 END) > 0
   AND COUNT(CASE WHEN s.citizenship_status = 'international' THEN 1 END) > 0
   AND COUNT(CASE WHEN s.citizenship_status = 'permanent_resident' THEN 1 END) = 0

query: List departments that offer both bachelor and master programs but no doctorate program.
sql:
SELECT d.department_id, d.department_name
FROM departments d
JOIN programs p ON d.department_id = p.department_id
GROUP BY d.department_id, d.department_name
HAVING SUM(CASE WHEN p.degree_level = 'bachelor' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0
   AND SUM(CASE WHEN p.degree_level = 'master' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0
   AND SUM(CASE WHEN p.degree_level = 'doctorate' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 0

query: List students who have both completed and withdrawn enrollments but no failed enrollment.
sql:
SELECT s.student_id, s.first_name, s.last_name
FROM students s
JOIN enrollments e ON s.student_id = e.student_id
GROUP BY s.student_id, s.first_name, s.last_name
HAVING SUM(CASE WHEN e.enrollment_status = 'completed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0
   AND SUM(CASE WHEN e.enrollment_status = 'withdrawn' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0
   AND SUM(CASE WHEN e.enrollment_status = 'failed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 0

query: List courses with both present and late attendance records but no absent records.
sql:
SELECT c.course_id, c.course_code, c.course_title
FROM courses c
JOIN attendance_records ar ON c.course_id = ar.course_id
GROUP BY c.course_id, c.course_code, c.course_title
HAVING SUM(CASE WHEN ar.attendance_status = 'present' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0
   AND SUM(CASE WHEN ar.attendance_status = 'late' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0
   AND SUM(CASE WHEN ar.attendance_status = 'absent' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 0

query: List instructors who taught both active and inactive courses but never taught an online course.
sql:
SELECT i.instructor_id, i.first_name, i.last_name
FROM instructors i
JOIN courses c ON i.instructor_id = c.instructor_id
GROUP BY i.instructor_id, i.first_name, i.last_name
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN c.active_flag = '1' THEN c.course_id END) > 0
   AND COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN c.active_flag = '0' THEN c.course_id END) > 0
   AND COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN c.delivery_mode = 'online' THEN c.course_id END) = 0

query: List students who received both academic-plan and career advising but no probation advising.
sql:
SELECT s.student_id, s.first_name, s.last_name
FROM students s
WHERE EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM academic_advising aa
    WHERE aa.student_id = s.student_id
      AND aa.appointment_type = 'academic_plan'
)
AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM academic_advising aa
    WHERE aa.student_id = s.student_id
      AND aa.appointment_type = 'career'
)
AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM academic_advising aa
    WHERE aa.student_id = s.student_id
      AND aa.appointment_type = 'probation'
)

query: List departments with both tenured and tenure-track instructors but no lecturer.
sql: SELECT "departments"."department_id", "departments"."department_name", COUNT(*) AS "tenured_count", COUNT(*) AS "tenure_track_count", COUNT(*) AS "lecturer_count" FROM "instructors" INNER JOIN "departments" ON "instructors"."department_id" = "departments"."department_id" GROUP BY "departments"."department_id", "departments"."department_name" HAVING "tenured_count" >= ? AND "tenure_track_count" >= ? AND "lecturer_count" = ?
audit_note: Counts every instructor row for the tenured, tenure-track, and lecturer aliases without applying tenure or job-title conditions.

query: List programs whose students attended both lecture and lab sessions but no exam session.
sql:
SELECT p.program_id, p.program_name
FROM programs p
JOIN students s ON p.program_id = s.program_id
JOIN enrollments e ON s.student_id = e.student_id
JOIN attendance_records ar ON e.enrollment_id = ar.enrollment_id
GROUP BY p.program_id, p.program_name
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN ar.session_type = 'lecture' THEN 1 END) >= 1
   AND COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN ar.session_type = 'lab' THEN 1 END) >= 1
   AND COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN ar.session_type = 'exam' THEN 1 END) = 0

query: List courses taken by both financially aided and non-aided students but no international students.
sql:
SELECT c.course_id, c.course_code, c.course_title
FROM courses c
JOIN enrollments e ON c.course_id = e.course_id
JOIN students s ON e.student_id = s.student_id
WHERE EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM enrollments e1
    JOIN students s1 ON e1.student_id = s1.student_id
    WHERE e1.course_id = c.course_id
      AND s1.financial_aid_flag = 1
)
AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM enrollments e2
    JOIN students s2 ON e2.student_id = s2.student_id
    WHERE e2.course_id = c.course_id
      AND s2.financial_aid_flag = 0
)
AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM enrollments e3
    JOIN students s3 ON e3.student_id = s3.student_id
    WHERE e3.course_id = c.course_id
      AND s3.citizenship_status = 'international'
)
GROUP BY c.course_id, c.course_code, c.course_title

query: List students with enrollments in both their own program and another program but no failed enrollment.
sql:
SELECT s.student_id, s.first_name, s.last_name
FROM students s
JOIN enrollments e ON s.student_id = e.student_id
JOIN programs p ON s.program_id = p.program_id
WHERE e.final_grade != 'F'
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM enrollments e1
    WHERE e1.student_id = s.student_id
      AND e1.final_grade != 'F'
      AND e1.course_id IN (
        SELECT course_id
        FROM courses
        WHERE program_id = s.program_id
      )
  )
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM enrollments e2
    WHERE e2.student_id = s.student_id
      AND e2.final_grade != 'F'
      AND e2.course_id IN (
        SELECT course_id
        FROM courses
        WHERE program_id != s.program_id
      )
  )
GROUP BY s.student_id, s.first_name, s.last_name
audit_note: Uses final_grade != 'F' instead of requiring that the student have no enrollment with failed status.

query: List instructors who taught both undergraduate and graduate course levels but no 600-level course.
sql:
SELECT i.instructor_id, i.first_name, i.last_name
FROM instructors i
JOIN courses c ON i.instructor_id = c.instructor_id
GROUP BY i.instructor_id
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN c.course_level = 'undergraduate' THEN 1 END) > 0
   AND COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN c.course_level = 'graduate' THEN 1 END) > 0
   AND COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN c.course_level = '600' THEN 1 END) = 0
audit_note: Filters nonexistent 'undergraduate' and 'graduate' course-level literals; the database stores numeric levels such as 100 through 600.

query: List departments with both completed and failed enrollments but no withdrawn enrollments.
sql:
SELECT d.department_id, d.department_name
FROM departments d
JOIN enrollments e ON d.department_id = (
    SELECT c.department_id
    FROM courses c
    WHERE c.course_id = e.course_id
)
GROUP BY d.department_id, d.department_name
HAVING SUM(CASE WHEN e.enrollment_status = 'completed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0
   AND SUM(CASE WHEN e.enrollment_status = 'failed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0
   AND SUM(CASE WHEN e.enrollment_status = 'withdrawn' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 0

query: List programs with both active and graduated students but no withdrawn students.
sql:
SELECT p.program_id, p.program_name
FROM programs p
JOIN students s ON p.program_id = s.program_id
JOIN enrollments e ON s.student_id = e.student_id
GROUP BY p.program_id, p.program_name
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN s.student_status = 'active' THEN s.student_id END) > 0
   AND COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN s.student_status = 'graduated' THEN s.student_id END) > 0
   AND COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN e.enrollment_status = 'withdrawn' THEN e.enrollment_id END) = 0
audit_note: Checks for withdrawn enrollment records instead of students whose student_status is withdrawn.

query: List students whose GPA is above the overall student average.
sql:
SELECT s.student_id, s.first_name, s.last_name, s.cumulative_gpa
FROM students s
WHERE s.cumulative_gpa > (SELECT AVG(cumulative_gpa) FROM students)

query: List students with more credits earned than the overall student average.
sql:
WITH student_totals AS (
  SELECT student_id, SUM(credits_earned) AS total_credits
  FROM students
  GROUP BY student_id
),
avg_credits AS (
  SELECT AVG(total_credits) AS avg_total
  FROM student_totals
)
SELECT s.student_id, s.first_name, s.last_name, s.credits_earned
FROM students s
JOIN student_totals st ON s.student_id = st.student_id
CROSS JOIN avg_credits ac
WHERE st.total_credits > ac.avg_total

query: List departments with budgets above the average department budget.
sql:
SELECT d.department_id, d.department_name, d.annual_budget
FROM departments d
WHERE d.annual_budget > (SELECT AVG(annual_budget) FROM departments)

query: List instructors earning more than the average instructor salary.
sql:
SELECT instructor_id, first_name, last_name, salary
FROM instructors
WHERE salary > (SELECT AVG(salary) FROM instructors)

query: List instructors with performance ratings above the instructor average.
sql:
SELECT i.instructor_id, i.first_name, i.last_name, i.performance_rating
FROM instructors i
WHERE i.performance_rating > (SELECT AVG(performance_rating) FROM instructors)

query: List programs with tuition per credit above the program average.
sql:
SELECT program_id, program_name, tuition_per_credit
FROM programs
WHERE tuition_per_credit > (SELECT AVG(tuition_per_credit) FROM programs)

query: List programs with current enrollment above the average program enrollment.
sql:
SELECT program_id, program_name, current_enrollment
FROM programs
WHERE current_enrollment > (SELECT AVG(current_enrollment) FROM programs)

query: List courses with capacity above the average course capacity.
sql:
SELECT courses.course_id, courses.course_code, courses.course_title, courses.capacity
FROM courses
WHERE courses.capacity > (SELECT AVG(courses.capacity) FROM courses)

query: List courses with enrolled count above the average course enrollment.
sql:
SELECT courses.course_id, courses.course_code, courses.course_title, courses.enrolled_count
FROM courses
WHERE courses.enrolled_count > (SELECT AVG(enrolled_count) FROM courses)

query: List enrollments with numeric grades above the completed-enrollment average.
sql:
SELECT e.enrollment_id, e.student_id, e.course_id, e.numeric_grade
FROM enrollments e
WHERE e.numeric_grade > (
    SELECT AVG(e2.numeric_grade)
    FROM enrollments e2
    WHERE e2.enrollment_status = 'completed'
)

query: List enrollments with scholarship amounts above the average scholarship.
sql:
SELECT e.enrollment_id, e.student_id, e.course_id, e.scholarship_amount
FROM enrollments e
WHERE e.scholarship_amount > (SELECT AVG(scholarship_amount) FROM enrollments)

query: List advising appointments longer than the average advising appointment.
sql:
SELECT advising_id, appointment_date, duration_minutes
FROM academic_advising
WHERE duration_minutes > (SELECT AVG(duration_minutes) FROM academic_advising)

query: List attendance records with quiz scores above the average quiz score.
sql:
SELECT ar.attendance_id, ar.enrollment_id, ar.student_id, ar.course_id, ar.instructor_id, ar.class_date, ar.session_type, ar.attendance_status, ar.minutes_late, ar.minutes_present, ar.excused_flag, ar.reason_code, ar.recorded_by, ar.recorded_at, ar.participation_points, ar.quiz_score, ar.notes, ar.followup_required
FROM attendance_records ar
WHERE ar.quiz_score > (SELECT AVG(quiz_score) FROM attendance_records)

query: List students who have never received an advising appointment.
sql:
SELECT s.student_id, s.first_name, s.last_name
FROM students s
WHERE NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM academic_advising aa
    WHERE aa.student_id = s.student_id
)

query: List courses that have never had an enrollment record.
sql:
SELECT c.course_id, c.course_code, c.course_title
FROM courses c
WHERE NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM enrollments e
    WHERE e.course_id = c.course_id
)

query: List students whose GPA is above the average GPA for their program.
sql:
SELECT s.student_id, s.first_name, s.last_name, s.cumulative_gpa
FROM students s
JOIN programs p ON s.program_id = p.program_id
WHERE s.cumulative_gpa > (
    SELECT AVG(s2.cumulative_gpa)
    FROM students s2
    WHERE s2.program_id = s.program_id
)

query: List instructors earning more than the average salary in their department.
sql:
SELECT i.instructor_id, i.first_name, i.last_name, i.salary, i.department_id
FROM instructors i
WHERE i.salary > (
    SELECT AVG(i2.salary)
    FROM instructors i2
    WHERE i2.department_id = i.department_id
)

query: List programs with current enrollment above the average for their degree level.
sql:
SELECT p.program_id, p.program_name, p.current_enrollment
FROM programs p
WHERE p.current_enrollment > (
    SELECT AVG(p2.current_enrollment)
    FROM programs p2
    WHERE p2.degree_level = p.degree_level
)

query: List courses with enrolled count above the average for their department.
sql:
SELECT c.course_id, c.course_code, c.course_title, c.enrolled_count
FROM courses c
WHERE c.enrolled_count > (
    SELECT AVG(c2.enrolled_count)
    FROM courses c2
    WHERE c2.department_id = c.department_id
)

query: List enrollments with numeric grades above the average for the same course.
sql:
SELECT e.enrollment_id, e.student_id, e.course_id, e.numeric_grade
FROM enrollments e
WHERE e.numeric_grade > (
    SELECT AVG(e2.numeric_grade)
    FROM enrollments e2
    WHERE e2.course_id = e.course_id
)

query: List students whose total tuition is above the average student total tuition.
sql:
SELECT s.student_id, s.first_name, s.last_name
FROM students s
JOIN enrollments e ON s.student_id = e.student_id
GROUP BY s.student_id, s.first_name, s.last_name
HAVING SUM(e.tuition_amount) > (
    SELECT AVG(student_total_tuition)
    FROM (
        SELECT SUM(e2.tuition_amount) AS student_total_tuition
        FROM enrollments e2
        GROUP BY e2.student_id
    )
)

query: List students whose total scholarship is above the average among scholarship recipients.
sql:
SELECT s.student_id, s.first_name, s.last_name
FROM students s
JOIN enrollments e ON s.student_id = e.student_id
GROUP BY s.student_id, s.first_name, s.last_name
HAVING SUM(e.scholarship_amount) > (
    SELECT AVG(total_scholarship)
    FROM (
        SELECT SUM(e2.scholarship_amount) AS total_scholarship
        FROM enrollments e2
        GROUP BY e2.student_id
        HAVING SUM(e2.scholarship_amount) > 0
    )
)

query: List instructors who teach more courses than the average instructor who teaches a course.
sql:
WITH instructor_course_counts AS (
    SELECT instructor_id, COUNT(DISTINCT course_id) AS course_count
    FROM courses
    GROUP BY instructor_id
),
avg_course_count AS (
    SELECT AVG(course_count) AS avg_count
    FROM instructor_course_counts
)
SELECT i.instructor_id, i.first_name, i.last_name
FROM instructors i
JOIN instructor_course_counts icc ON i.instructor_id = icc.instructor_id
CROSS JOIN avg_course_count acc
WHERE icc.course_count > acc.avg_count

query: List courses with more completed enrollments than the average course.
sql:
SELECT c.course_id, c.course_code, c.course_title
FROM courses c
JOIN enrollments e ON c.course_id = e.course_id
GROUP BY c.course_id, c.course_code, c.course_title
HAVING SUM(CASE WHEN e.enrollment_status = 'completed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > (
    SELECT AVG(completed_count)
    FROM (
        SELECT COUNT(*) AS completed_count
        FROM enrollments
        WHERE enrollment_status = 'completed'
        GROUP BY course_id
    )
)
audit_note: Computes the comparison average only across courses with at least one completed enrollment, excluding zero-completion courses.

query: List advisors who conducted more appointments than the average advisor.
sql:
SELECT i.instructor_id, i.first_name, i.last_name
FROM academic_advising aa
JOIN instructors i ON aa.instructor_id = i.instructor_id
GROUP BY i.instructor_id, i.first_name, i.last_name
HAVING COUNT(aa.advising_id) > (
    SELECT AVG(appointment_count)
    FROM (
        SELECT COUNT(advising_id) AS appointment_count
        FROM academic_advising
        GROUP BY instructor_id
    )
)

query: List students with more attendance records than the average student with attendance.
sql:
SELECT s.student_id, s.first_name, s.last_name
FROM students s
JOIN attendance_records a ON s.student_id = a.student_id
GROUP BY s.student_id
HAVING COUNT(a.attendance_id) > (
    SELECT AVG(student_count)
    FROM (
        SELECT COUNT(*) AS student_count
        FROM attendance_records
        GROUP BY student_id
    )
)

query: List courses whose average quiz score is above the average course quiz score.
sql:
SELECT c.course_id, c.course_title
FROM courses c
JOIN attendance_records ar ON c.course_id = ar.course_id
GROUP BY c.course_id, c.course_title
HAVING AVG(ar.quiz_score) > (SELECT AVG(quiz_score) FROM attendance_records)
audit_note: Compares each course average with the overall record-level quiz average, not the average of course-level averages.

query: List departments whose active student count is above the average department active student count.
sql:
WITH dept_active_counts AS (
    SELECT 
        d.department_id,
        d.department_name,
        COUNT(s.student_id) AS active_student_count
    FROM departments d
    JOIN programs p ON d.department_id = p.department_id
    JOIN students s ON p.program_id = s.program_id
    WHERE s.student_status = 'active'
    GROUP BY d.department_id, d.department_name
),
avg_count AS (
    SELECT AVG(active_student_count) AS avg_active
    FROM dept_active_counts
)
SELECT 
    dac.department_id,
    dac.department_name
FROM dept_active_counts dac
CROSS JOIN avg_count ac
WHERE dac.active_student_count > ac.avg_active
audit_note: Computes the department average only among departments having active students, excluding zero-active-student departments.

query: List programs whose average student GPA is above the average program GPA.
sql:
SELECT p.program_id, p.program_name
FROM programs p
JOIN students s ON p.program_id = s.program_id
GROUP BY p.program_id, p.program_name
HAVING AVG(s.cumulative_gpa) > (SELECT AVG(cumulative_gpa) FROM students)
audit_note: Compares each program's GPA with the overall student GPA, not with the average of program-level GPAs.

query: List instructors whose students have an average grade above the overall completed-enrollment average.
sql:
SELECT i.instructor_id, i.first_name, i.last_name
FROM instructors i
JOIN enrollments e ON i.instructor_id = e.instructor_id
GROUP BY i.instructor_id, i.first_name, i.last_name
HAVING AVG(e.numeric_grade) > (
    SELECT AVG(numeric_grade)
    FROM enrollments
    WHERE enrollment_status = 'completed'
)

query: List students whose most recent enrollment is completed.
sql:
WITH ranked_enrollments AS (
  SELECT 
    e.student_id,
    e.enrollment_status,
    e.enrollment_date,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY e.student_id ORDER BY e.enrollment_date DESC) AS rn
  FROM enrollments e
)
SELECT 
  s.student_id,
  s.first_name,
  s.last_name
FROM students s
JOIN ranked_enrollments re ON s.student_id = re.student_id
WHERE re.rn = 1 AND re.enrollment_status = 'completed'

query: List courses whose latest attendance record was marked absent.
sql:
SELECT c.course_id, c.course_code, c.course_title
FROM courses c
JOIN attendance_records ar ON c.course_id = ar.course_id
WHERE ar.attendance_status = 'absent'
  AND ar.class_date = (
    SELECT MAX(ar2.class_date)
    FROM attendance_records ar2
    WHERE ar2.course_id = c.course_id
  )

query: List programs where every active student has a GPA above 2.5.
sql:
SELECT p.program_id, p.program_name
FROM programs p
JOIN students s ON p.program_id = s.program_id
WHERE s.student_status = 'active'
GROUP BY p.program_id, p.program_name
HAVING MIN(s.cumulative_gpa) > 2.5

query: List instructors for whom every active course has at least one enrollment.
sql:
SELECT i.instructor_id, i.first_name, i.last_name
FROM instructors i
WHERE NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM courses c
    WHERE c.instructor_id = i.instructor_id
      AND c.active_flag = '1'
      AND NOT EXISTS (
          SELECT 1
          FROM enrollments e
          WHERE e.course_id = c.course_id
            AND e.enrollment_id IS NOT NULL
      )
)

query: List departments where every active program has current enrollment above zero.
sql:

FROM departments d
JOIN programs p ON d.department_id = p.department_id
WHERE p.active_flag = '1'
GROUP BY d.department_id, d.department_name
HAVING MIN(p.current_enrollment) > 0

query: List the student with the highest GPA in each program.
sql:
WITH RankedStudents AS (
    SELECT
        student_id,
        first_name,
        last_name,
        program_id,
        cumulative_gpa,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY program_id ORDER BY cumulative_gpa DESC) AS rn
    FROM students
)
SELECT
    student_id,
    first_name,
    last_name,
    program_id,
    cumulative_gpa
FROM RankedStudents
WHERE rn = 1

query: List the highest-paid instructor in each department.
sql:
WITH RankedInstructors AS (
    SELECT 
        instructor_id,
        first_name,
        last_name,
        department_id,
        salary,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY department_id ORDER BY salary DESC) AS rn
    FROM instructors
)
SELECT 
    instructor_id,
    first_name,
    last_name,
    department_id,
    salary
FROM RankedInstructors
WHERE rn = 1

query: List the course with the highest enrolled count in each program.
sql:
WITH RankedCourses AS (
    SELECT 
        c.course_id,
        c.program_id,
        c.enrolled_count,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY c.program_id ORDER BY c.enrolled_count DESC) AS rn
    FROM courses c
)
SELECT 
    course_id,
    program_id,
    enrolled_count
FROM RankedCourses
WHERE rn = 1

query: List students whose GPA is above the average for their degree level and whose credits exceed their program average.
sql:
SELECT s.student_id, s.first_name, s.last_name, s.cumulative_gpa, s.credits_earned
FROM students s
JOIN programs p ON s.program_id = p.program_id
WHERE s.cumulative_gpa > (
    SELECT AVG(s2.cumulative_gpa)
    FROM students s2
    JOIN programs p2 ON s2.program_id = p2.program_id
    WHERE p2.degree_level = p.degree_level
)
AND s.credits_earned > (
    SELECT AVG(s3.credits_earned)
    FROM students s3
    JOIN programs p3 ON s3.program_id = p3.program_id
    WHERE p3.program_id = p.program_id
)

query: List instructors whose average student grade is above the average instructor grade within their department.
sql:
SELECT i.instructor_id, i.first_name, i.last_name
FROM instructors i
JOIN courses c ON i.instructor_id = c.instructor_id
JOIN enrollments e ON c.course_id = e.course_id
GROUP BY i.instructor_id, i.first_name, i.last_name
HAVING AVG(e.numeric_grade) > (
    SELECT AVG(instructor_avg)
    FROM (
        SELECT AVG(e2.numeric_grade) AS instructor_avg
        FROM instructors i2
        JOIN courses c2 ON i2.instructor_id = c2.instructor_id
        JOIN enrollments e2 ON c2.course_id = e2.course_id
        WHERE i2.department_id = i.department_id
        GROUP BY i2.instructor_id
    )
)

query: List courses whose attendance rate is above the average attendance rate in their department.
sql:
SELECT c.course_id, c.course_title
FROM courses c
JOIN enrollments e ON c.course_id = e.course_id
WHERE e.attendance_percentage > (
    SELECT AVG(e2.attendance_percentage)
    FROM enrollments e2
    JOIN courses c2 ON e2.course_id = c2.course_id
    WHERE c2.department_id = c.department_id
)
audit_note: Compares individual enrollment attendance values with a department average and never computes the course attendance rate first.

query: List departments whose instructor payroll is above the average payroll for departments in the same school.
sql:
SELECT d.department_id, d.department_name, d.school_name
FROM departments d
JOIN instructors i ON d.department_id = i.department_id
GROUP BY d.department_id, d.department_name, d.school_name
HAVING SUM(i.salary) > (
    SELECT AVG(dept_total_payroll)
    FROM (
        SELECT SUM(i2.salary) AS dept_total_payroll
        FROM departments d2
        JOIN instructors i2 ON d2.department_id = i2.department_id
        WHERE d2.school_name = d.school_name
        GROUP BY d2.department_id
    )
)

query: List students who completed every course in which they have an enrollment record.
sql:
SELECT s.student_id, s.first_name, s.last_name
FROM students s
JOIN enrollments e ON s.student_id = e.student_id
GROUP BY s.student_id, s.first_name, s.last_name
HAVING COUNT(CASE WHEN e.enrollment_status = 'completed' THEN 1 END) = COUNT(e.enrollment_id)

query: List instructors for whom every recorded enrollment is completed.
sql:
SELECT i.instructor_id, i.first_name, i.last_name
FROM instructors i
JOIN enrollments e ON i.instructor_id = e.instructor_id
GROUP BY i.instructor_id, i.first_name, i.last_name
HAVING COUNT(*) = (
    SELECT COUNT(*)
    FROM enrollments e2
    WHERE e2.instructor_id = i.instructor_id
)
AND COUNT(CASE WHEN e.enrollment_status = 'completed' THEN 1 END) = COUNT(*)

query: List programs whose students have taken every delivery mode used by courses in that program.
sql:
SELECT p.program_id, p.program_name
FROM programs p
JOIN courses c ON p.program_id = c.program_id
GROUP BY p.program_id, p.program_name
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT c.delivery_mode) = (
    SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT c2.delivery_mode)
    FROM courses c2
    WHERE c2.program_id = p.program_id
)
audit_note: Never joins students or enrollments; it compares a program's course delivery modes with the same set, making the condition tautological.

query: List departments where every active instructor teaches at least one active course.
sql:
SELECT d.department_id, d.department_name
FROM departments d
WHERE NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM instructors i
    WHERE i.department_id = d.department_id
      AND i.active_flag = '1'
      AND NOT EXISTS (
          SELECT 1
          FROM courses c
          WHERE c.instructor_id = i.instructor_id
            AND c.active_flag = '1'
      )
)

query: List students whose three most recent completed grades improved each time.
sql:
WITH student_recent_grades AS (
    SELECT
        e.student_id,
        e.final_grade,
        e.enrollment_date,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
            PARTITION BY e.student_id
            ORDER BY e.enrollment_date DESC
        ) AS rn
    FROM enrollments e
    WHERE e.enrollment_status = 'completed'
),
top_three AS (
    SELECT
        student_id,
        final_grade,
        enrollment_date,
        rn
    FROM student_recent_grades
    WHERE rn <= 3
),
grade_order AS (
    SELECT
        student_id,
        final_grade,
        rn,
        CASE final_grade
            WHEN 'A' THEN 5
            WHEN 'B' THEN 4
            WHEN 'C' THEN 3
            WHEN 'D' THEN 2
            WHEN 'F' THEN 1
            ELSE 0
        END AS grade_value
    FROM top_three
),
improvement_check AS (
    SELECT
        g1.student_id,
        COUNT(*) AS improved_count
    FROM grade_order g1
    JOIN grade_order g2 ON g1.student_id = g2.student_id AND g1.rn = g2.rn - 1
    WHERE g2.grade_value > g1.grade_value
    GROUP BY g1.student_id
)
SELECT
    s.student_id,
    s.first_name,
    s.last_name
FROM students s
JOIN improvement_check ic ON s.student_id = ic.student_id
WHERE ic.improved_count = 2
audit_note: The row-number comparison is reversed, selecting students whose newer grades declined rather than improved.

query: List courses whose 2025 completed enrollment count exceeded their 2024 count.
sql:
SELECT c.course_id, c.course_title
FROM courses c
JOIN enrollments e ON c.course_id = e.course_id
WHERE e.enrollment_status = 'completed'
  AND (
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM enrollments e2 
     WHERE e2.course_id = c.course_id 
       AND e2.enrollment_status = 'completed' 
       AND e2.enrollment_date LIKE '2025%')
    >
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM enrollments e3 
     WHERE e3.course_id = c.course_id 
       AND e3.enrollment_status = 'completed' 
       AND e3.enrollment_date LIKE '2024%')
  )
GROUP BY c.course_id, c.course_title
